name: @sekiban/as-wasm
description: AssemblyScript projector SDK for the Sekiban WASM Runtime: pinned-buffer memory management, string marshalling, the materialized-view SQL statement protocol, and paging helpers for building Sekiban DCB projector modules.
author: J-Tech Japan, Inc.

scripts.build: asc assembly/index.ts --outFile build/sekiban-as-wasm-check.wasm --optimize --exportStart _initialize --runtime incremental --exportRuntime --use abort= --transform json-as/transform
